name: chat-server
description: Real-time chat server with node sync

scripts.postinstall: node -e "require('child_process').execSync('mkdir -p certs && openssl req -x509 -newkey rsa:4096 -keyout certs/server.key -out certs/server.crt -days 365 -nodes -subj \"/CN=localhost\" || true', {stdio:'inherit'})"
